creator: rafal@euromedia.pl
text:
it worked under 3.4-STABLE but not under 4.0 ftpd (also 5.0-CURRENT),
it chroots after anon login into main ftp tree (but not into proper 
virtual ftp tree), i checked this under 3.4-STABLE and it works without
any problem, but the problem begins on 4.0-STABLE and 5.0-CURRENT

How-To-Repeat: try to create virtual anonymous ftp hosts in /etc/ftphosts,
under 4.0-STABLE (and 5.0-CURRENT 2000.05.12) virtual ftp hosts
feature isn't working
